name: testWaitForScopeFitData
title: testWaitForScopeFitData
syntax: long testWaitForScopeFitData(message aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd); // form 1
long testWaitForScopeFitData(message aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword preTimeNs, dword postTimeNs); // form 2
long testWaitForScopeFitData(linFrame aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd); // form 3
long testWaitForScopeFitData(linFrame aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword preTimeNs, dword postTimeNs); // form 4
long testWaitForScopeFitData(message aMessage, dword msgFieldStart, dword msgFieldEnd, dword flags); // form 5
description: The defined frame cutout is shown in the scope's Diagram view. The enlarged area is automatically scaled in time direction.

parameters.name: msgFieldStart, msgFieldEnd
parameters.description: The start and end of the cutout to be fitted. See ScopeBitAnalyse.cin

parameters.name: preTimeNs
parameters.description: Defines the preliminary lead time in [ns] for the defined message field start.

parameters.name: postTimeNs
parameters.description: Defines the overtravel time in [ns] for the defined message field end.
0 - CAN high signal not visible 1 - CAN high signal visible
0 - CAN low signal not visible 1 - CAN low signal visible
0 - CAN diff signal not visible 1 - CAN diff signal visible
0 - CAN CMV signal not visible 1 - CAN CMV signal visible

availability: 8.2: form 1 9.0: form 2 9.0 SP4: form 3, 4 10.0 SP3: form 5: form 1
1.1 SP2: form 1 2.1: form 2 2.1 SP4: form 3, 4 2.2 SP2: form 5
